title: The Hadoop Solution for Big Data
description: A flowchart illustrating the problems with traditional systems and how Hadoop's features provide the solution, justifying its use in Big Data Analytics.
relationships: Traditional Systems fail to handle Big Data Challenges
Hadoop is designed to directly address these challenges
HDFS provides Scalable & Cost-Effective Storage for Volume
MapReduce enables Parallel & Distributed Processing for Velocity
Hadoop's ecosystem offers Fault-Tolerant & Flexible Analysis for Variety
